commands.repair_reason: No automation repair is queued because there is no discrete code finding; the remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real Feishu proof and maintainer choice between this PR and the older overlapping PR.; Cleared: The diff reuses the existing Feishu media download/save path with the existing maxBytes guard and does not change dependencies, CI, scripts, secrets, package resolution, or permissions. commands.review_summary:
The PR preserves raw fetched Feishu message content, resolves media from permitted quoted/replied parent messages, and adds Feishu bot/send tests for quoted file media context.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection rather than a live run: current main fetches quoted parent text but drops raw media JSON and builds MediaPaths before the quote fetch. A Feishu user replying to a file or image while mentioning the bot will therefore pass only a placeholder such as [file message] unless this path changes.
